'''Spike''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] strike team leader who participated in the liberation of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. His team was responsible for disabling the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] and its [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]], paving the way for a [[Task force/Legends|task force]] of [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] to secure the [[Star system/Legends|system]].

{{Char-stub}}
